summary: Iteration 47 - Bug fixes verification for NASSAQ Platform Admin. Tested 9 specific issues from the bug report. All critical fixes verified successfully.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error due to Pydantic validation - UserResponse model requires 'id' field but some DB records may have only '_id'. Frontend uses /api/users/platform-users which works correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart width/height being -1 - charts render correctly but warnings appear during initial load
Missing aria-describedby warning for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Chart console warnings about width/height -1 should be addressed by adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer components
DialogContent components should include aria-describedby for accessibility compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 tested issues from the bug report are now fixed and verified. The /api/users endpoint has a minor issue but the frontend uses /api/users/platform-users which works correctly.

issue_1.evidence: Hijri date 1447/09/24 هـ displayed correctly with Gregorian date 2026/03/11

issues_2_3.evidence: Charts render correctly with 126 SVG elements, no errors when filtering

issue_12.evidence: AI Operations panel found with 4 operation cards, icons are clickable

issue_15.evidence: Page loads successfully with 100 users displayed

issues_18_21_42.evidence: Export dropdown shows PDF and Excel options, Security report download works

issue_20.evidence: Edit User dialog opens successfully with form fields

issues_23_29_47_53.description: Security Center and System Monitoring tools
issues_23_29_47_53.evidence: Both pages load successfully with 8 clickable tool cards each
